question_text: A car is being pushed across a floor with a force of 500 N. Friction opposes the motion with a force of 200 N. Calculate the net force on the car.
explanation: Net force is found by adding all forces together, accounting for direction. The pushing force is 500 N forward and friction is 200 N backward, so the net force is 500 - 200 = 300 N in the direction of motion.
